title: The New York Times is adding another daily crossword, because why not
description: Veni, vidi, vici? Try Mini, Midi, Maxi. Okay, The New York Times does not call its big daily crossword the Maxi — but otherwise it fits. Just as Julius Caesar came, saw, and conquered, the Times continues to push the boundaries of its gaming empire with a new Midi edition of its puzzle. The standard...
